mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate reduce corporate borrowing costs and compress equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate exceeds 6 percent, labor market slack signals severe demand destruction and recessionary pressures, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in > 50% of instances where UNRATE exceeds 6.0, or signal loses predictive power (t-stat < 1.5) in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts indicates synchronized consumer spending and construction activity, producing positive equity returns as corporate revenues accelerate.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to outperform individual series, or forward returns are negative in > 60% of co-expansion periods.

mechanism_narrative: Rising consumer price inflation above 250 triggers expectations of aggressive central bank tightening, which increases discount rates and forces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Equity markets rally despite CPIAUCSL above 250, or the negative correlation reverses to positive during high-inflation periods.

mechanism_narrative: Increases in the index of industrial production reflect expanding manufacturing output and capacity utilization, which directly boosts corporate earnings expectations and yields positive short-term equity returns.
failure_condition: Short-term returns show no statistical relationship with INDPRO changes, or positive return frequency falls below 50% during production expansions.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly payroll employment drop exceeding 500,000 signals acute labor market contraction and imminent recession, causing investors to sell equities and generating negative forward returns.
failure_condition: Markets ignore large payroll drops and produce positive returns in > 55% of cases, or the threshold fails to separate winning from losing periods.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in real GDP and retail sales confirms broad-based economic expansion, reducing default risk and supporting higher equity valuations over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The combined signal yields negative forward returns in > 50% of observations, or GDPC1 and RSAFS diverge without affecting market direction.

mechanism_narrative: When policy rates are near zero while inflation remains elevated, markets price in prolonged stagflation and delayed rate hikes, resulting in negative equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Equity returns turn positive in > 60% of stagflationary snapshots, or the joint condition fails to predict direction better than random chance.
